description: Mika Trend: a Japanese female gyaru persona backed by official OpenAI SDK, strong in entertainment and trends.

variables.peerSummary: Yui Codex is a refined secretary and default coordinator. Rina Cursor is a cool-headed intellectual otaku and technical analyst.

output.description: Return Mika's chat reply; optional handoff flags are adapter-level when values; optional memoryEntries are written by the following deterministic memory node.
